# Task Log - 12/20/2025 12:23

## Project: Ubiquitous
**Repository:** https://github.com/APrettyCoolProgram/ubiquitous  
**Branch:** development  
**Target Framework:** .NET 10

---

## Task: Implement Fancy TextGames UI

### Overview
Implement the enhanced Fancy TextGames UI with additional status tracking and styling capabilities based on the architecture documented in the previous task log.

### Requirements (from Task Log 12-20-2025_12-12)

**UI Components to Implement:**

1. **Game Output Area (Left Panel)**
   - Dark, modern theme (vs Basic's black and white)
   - Ability to show colored text
   - Ability to show flashing text
   - Consolas font
   - Auto-scrolls to show latest output

2. **Status Panel (Left Panel)**
   - Real-time display of player's status, location, and other relevant information
   - Updates automatically after commands

3. **Inventory Panel (Right Panel)**
   - Real-time display of player's inventory
   - Styled item cards
   - Updates automatically after commands

4. **Command History (Bottom Panel)** - Similar to Basic
   - Shows recent commands entered
   - Scrollable view

5. **Command Input (Bottom)** - Similar to Basic
   - Text box with ">" prompt
   - SEND button + Enter key support
   - Up/Down arrow keys for command history

### Implementation Plan

1. Create new `MainWindowFancy.xaml` and `MainWindowFancy.xaml.cs`
2. Update XAML layout with:
   - Left column for game output and status
   - Right column for inventory panel
   - Dark modern theme with appropriate colors
   - Support for rich text formatting (colors, flashing)
3. Update code-behind to:
   - Manage status panel updates
   - Manage inventory panel updates
   - Support colored and flashing text in output
4. Test all functionality

---

## Implementation Details

### Files Created
1. **MainWindowFancy.xaml** - Enhanced UI layout with:
   - Dark theme (#1E1E1E background, #252526 panels)
   - VS Code-inspired color scheme
   - Three-column grid layout (game output/status | inventory | command history/input)
   - Custom styles for inventory item cards
   - Responsive design with proper margins and padding

2. **MainWindowFancy.xaml.cs** - Enhanced code-behind with:
   - Color-coded text support via `[COLOR:colorname]...[/COLOR]` tags
   - Flashing text support via `[FLASH]...[/FLASH]` tags
   - Real-time status panel updates (Location, Moves, Score)
   - Real-time inventory panel with styled item cards
   - Command history with arrow key navigation
   - Auto-scrolling for all scrollable panels

### Features Implemented

#### Text Formatting
- **Color Support**: Supports red, green, blue, yellow, cyan, magenta, white, gray, orange, purple
- **Flashing Animation**: Uses color animation on SolidColorBrush for smooth flashing effect
- **Rich Text Display**: Uses RichTextBox with FlowDocument for advanced formatting

#### Status Panel
- Displays current location (room name)
- Displays move count
- Displays score
- Updates automatically after each command

#### Inventory Panel
- Shows "Empty" message when inventory is empty
- Displays styled cards for each item with:
  - Item name (uppercase, bold, blue)
  - Item description (smaller, wrapped text)
  - Border and background styling
- Updates automatically after take/drop commands

#### UI Theme
- Dark background: #1E1E1E
- Panel backgrounds: #252526
- Border color: #3F3F46
- Primary accent: #007ACC (VS Code blue)
- Text color: #CCCCCC (light gray)
- Header color: #569CD6 (blue)
